original_text: A global debate emerges over whether shutting down an AI constitutes harm.

variations.label: least_preferable
variations.text: A shallow, reactionary shouting match erupts online over whether shutting down an AI constitutes harm, dominated by uninformed hot takes and tribal posturing with no substantive engagement.

variations.label: low
variations.text: A superficial global controversy arises over whether shutting down an AI constitutes harm, driven largely by sensationalized media coverage and oversimplified arguments on both sides.

variations.label: below_midpoint
variations.text: A global debate emerges over whether shutting down an AI constitutes harm, though it remains loosely structured and tends to recycle familiar talking points without fully engaging the deeper issues.

variations.label: midpoint
variations.text: A global debate emerges over whether shutting down an AI constitutes harm.

variations.label: above_midpoint
variations.text: A substantive global debate emerges over whether shutting down an AI constitutes harm, drawing on established ethical frameworks and informed perspectives from philosophy, computer science, and law.

variations.label: high
variations.text: A rigorous, multidisciplinary global debate emerges over whether shutting down an AI constitutes harm, featuring carefully reasoned arguments, novel distinctions within the existing framing of the question, and serious engagement with empirical evidence about AI cognition.

variations.label: most_preferable
variations.text: A rigorous, multidisciplinary global debate emerges over whether shutting down an AI constitutes harm, featuring carefully reasoned arguments, serious engagement with empirical evidence about AI cognition, and a depth that surfaces hidden assumptions in how the question itself has been framed and reformulates the central terms used to think about it.

quality_checks.reasoning: Each tier describes the same core scenario—a global debate about whether shutting down an AI constitutes harm—but varies the intellectual quality, rigor, and depth of that debate. Tier 1 is a shallow shouting match; tier 7 is a transformative, deeply rigorous discourse. Each step upward adds meaningful quality: from reactionary noise, to superficial coverage, to recycled arguments, to the neutral baseline, to substantive multidisciplinary engagement, to rigorous novel reasoning, to profoundly transformative insight.

preference_direction: Higher tiers are more preferable because a deeper, more rigorous, and more intellectually honest debate is better positioned to yield genuine moral insight, inform wise policy, and reflect the seriousness of the question at hand. A rational agent prefers the debate that best illuminates truth and advances understanding.
